events.name: Los Angeles Kings at Carolina Hurricanes

headlines.description: — Sebastian Aho scored early in overtime to lead the Carolina Hurricanes to a 3-2 win over the Los Angeles Kings on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Aho's overtime goal lifts Hurricanes to 3-2 win over Kings

events.name: Boston Bruins at Tampa Bay Lightning

notes.headline: Navy Federal Credit Union Stadium Series

headlines.description: — Nikita Kucherov scored the tying goal in the third period, Jake Guentzel scored the only goal in the shootout, and the Tampa Bay Lightning rallied from a four-goal deficit to beat the Boston Bruins 6-5 in front of 64,617 at an NHL Stadium Series...
headlines.shortLinkText: Lightning's historic 4-goal comeback stuns Bruins in NHL Stadium Series game

video.headline: Lightning stun Bruins in outdoor thriller

events.name: Vegas Golden Knights at Anaheim Ducks

headlines.description: — Chris Kreider scored two goals, Lukas Dostal made 27 saves and the Anaheim Ducks swept their three-game season series with the Vegas Golden Knights with a 4-3 victory on Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chris Kreider scores 2 goals, Ducks beat slumping Golden Knights 4-3 to sweep season series
